case.title: CHICAGO & A R. CO. v. U S

opinion.h: CHICAGO & A R. CO. v. U S, 212 U.S. 563 (1909)
CHICAGO & ALTON RAILWAY COMPANY, Petitioner, v. UNITED STATES No. 238.
JOHN N. FAITHORN, Petitioner, v. UNITED STATES
FRED A. WANN, Petitioner, v. UNITED STATES
opinion.p: Messrs. F. S. Winston, Robert Mather, John Barton Payne, S. H. Strawn, Ralph M. Shaw, and Blackburn Esterline for petitioners.
The Attorney General and the Solicitor General for respondent.
Judgments affirmed by a divided court, and causes remanded to the District Court of the United States for the Northern District of Illinois.[ Chicago & A R Co v. U S 212 U.S. 563 (1909) ]
